desc:
Benefit:
1. One free bar advanced recruitment(2 free recruitment for VIP 2, 3 free recruitment for VIP 4)
2. Chain Attack: Chain Attack is now available in battles
3. Vitality: Can buy Vitality 1 time
4. Taxation: Daily Taxation cap is 10 times

Benefit:
1. Training Slot: Unlocks the third crew member training slot
2. Vitality: Can buy Vitality 3 times
3. Vitality Slot: Vitality slot cap is 110
4. Prestige reward: Extra 5% Prestige after a battle
5. All previous VIP benefits are included

Benefit:
1. Discount for enhancement: Silver-10% for equipment enhancement
2. Critical Hit: Critical Hit+2 levels during equipment enhancement
3. Vitality: Can buy Vitality 5 times
4. vitality slot: Vitality slot cap is 120
5. Underwater Treasure: Unlocks shipwreck treasure salvage
6. Bar recruitment: 2 free advanced recruitment per day
7. All previous VIP benefits are included

5. Vitality: Can buy Vitality 10 times

9. EXP reward: Get 5% extra EXP reward when a battle ends
10. Slave slot: Unlocks the 3rd slave slot
11. All previous VIP benefits are included
